title: State appropriations or grants
doc_html:
§600.107.  State appropriations or grants

The state may make grants or appropriations of money or property to the corporation for the purpose of enabling it to carry out its public functions and corporate purposes.

Acts 2011, No. 408, §1, eff. July 5, 2011.
